summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Afroboost Stripe payment integration. All 17 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend payment buttons correctly display and Stripe checkout redirects to real checkout.stripe.com. TWINT and Mobile Money endpoints create traceable transactions in manual mode.
critical_code_review_comments: Transaction created in DB BEFORE redirect to Stripe (traceable)
stripe_session_id stored in transaction after creation
Webhook endpoint /api/webhook/stripe exists and accepts requests
TWINT via /api/payrexx/create-payment creates pending transaction (manual mode)
Mobile Money via /api/flutterwave/create-payment creates pending transaction (manual mode)
All transactions visible in /api/payments/history with filters
Access created with status='pending' after payment (requires admin validation)
seed_data_creation: Created test transactions for TEST_stripe_*, TEST_twint_*, TEST_mtn_*, TEST_orange_* users. Level configs: Level 1 (Stripe+TWINT, 150 CHF), Level 2 (Volunteer only), Level 3 (MTN+Orange Mobile Money, 50000 XAF), Level 4 (Stripe, 100 EUR).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stripe payment flow fully tested: 1) User clicks 'Payer par Carte', 2) Backend creates transaction + calls Stripe API, 3) User redirected to checkout.stripe.com, 4) After payment, return to /payment-success?session_id=xxx, 5) Frontend polls status, 6) Backend creates UserAccess with status='pending' (admin validation required). TWINT and Mobile Money are in MANUAL mode - transactions created but require admin validation.

backend_apis: POST /api/stripe/create-checkout - Creates Stripe Checkout session (REAL integration)
GET /api/payments/history - All transactions visible with filters
frontend_components: LevelsPage.js - Payment buttons visible per level config
Level 1: 'Payer par Carte' (Stripe) + 'Payer par TWINT' buttons
Level 2: 'Soumettre une demande de bénévolat' button
PaymentSuccessPage.js - Shows payment status after Stripe redirect
integration_flow: Stripe button click → redirect to checkout.stripe.com (verified)
Volunteer request → creates pending access request
Mobile Money click → creates pending transaction with toast notification
